---
title: "Meta-clustering Workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Meta-clustering Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(phynotype)
```

`metacluster()` treats consensus clustering as a first-class workflow.

## Fit candidate solutions

```{r}
mfit <- metacluster(
  iris[, 1:4],
  methods = c("kmeans", "pam", "hclust"),
  k = 2:5,
  consensus = "coassoc",
  seed = 1
)

mfit
summary(mfit)
head(mfit$candidate_table)
```

## Inspect consensus structure

```{r}
dim(mfit$coassoc_matrix)
head(mfit$selection_summary)
```

## Validate the consensus solution

```{r}
mval <- validate(mfit)
mval$metrics_table
```

## Interpret the consensus solution

```{r}
mexp <- explore(mfit)
head(mexp$feature_summary)
```

## Plot consensus results

```{r}
plot_consensus(mfit)
plot_coassoc(mfit)
plot_validation(mval)
```
